rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem round1_challenge (n : ℤ) (hn : 0 ≤ n) : 
  3 * (2 * n - 1) * (2 * n + 1) * n = 12 * n^3 - 3 * n

theorem round2_challenge (f : ℤ → ℤ) 
  (h1 : ∀ x, f (x + 1) - f x = 2 * x + 1)
  (h0 : f 0 = 0) : ∀ n : ℤ, f n = n ^ 2
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have hpos : ∀ n : ℕ, f (n : ℤ) = (n : ℤ) ^ 2 := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero => simpa using h0
    | succ k ih =>
      have := h1 (k : ℤ)
      push_cast at this ⊢
      linarith
  have hneg : ∀ n : ℕ, f (-(n : ℤ)) = (n : ℤ) ^ 2 := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero => simpa using h0
    | succ k ih =>
      have h2 := h1 (-(↑(k + 1) : ℤ))
      have : -(↑(k + 1) : ℤ) + 1 = -(↑k : ℤ) := by push_cast; ring
      rw [this] at h2
      push_cast at h2 ih ⊢
      linarith
  intro n
  obtain ⟨m, rfl | rfl⟩ := Int.eq_nat_or_neg n
  · exact hpos m
  · rw [hneg m]; ring

:= by
  induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ m ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg m, sq_nonneg (m + 1), sq_nonneg (m * (m + 1))]

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem sum_range_mul_two_pow (n : ℕ) : 
  (∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, ((i : ℤ) + 1) * 2^i) = (n - 1) * 2^n + 1
rounds.proof:
:= by
  induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
    push_cast
    ring

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem polynomial_dvd_of_roots (p q : ℤ) (hp : p ∣ 6) (hq : q ∣ 6) (hpq : p ≠ q) 
    (hproot : p^2 - 5*p + 6 = 0) (hqroot : q^2 - 5*q + 6 = 0) : 
    p * q = 6 ∧ p + q = 5
rounds.proof:
:= by
  have hp6 : p ∣ 6 := hp
  have hq6 : q ∣ 6 := hq
  -- From the quadratic equations
  have heqp : p^2 = 5*p - 6 := by linarith
  have heqq : q^2 = 5*q - 6 := by linarith
  -- Both p and q are roots of x^2 - 5x + 6 = 0
  -- Factor: (x-2)(x-3) = 0, so p,q ∈ {2,3}
  have hp_vals : p = 2 ∨ p = 3 := by
    have : (p - 2) * (p - 3) = 0 := by ring_nf; linarith
    rcases mul_eq_zero.mp this with h | h
    · left; linarith
    · right; linarith
  have hq_vals : q = 2 ∨ q = 3 := by
    have : (q - 2) * (q - 3) = 0 := by ring_nf; linarith
    rcases mul_eq_zero.mp this with h | h
    · left; linarith
    · right; linarith
  rcases hp_vals with rfl | rfl <;> rcases hq_vals with rfl | rfl <;> simp_all

rounds.theorem_statement:
theorem fibonacci_sum_of_squares (n : ℕ) :
    Nat.fib n * Nat.fib n + Nat.fib (n+1) * Nat.fib (n+1) = Nat.fib (2*n+1)
rounds.proof:
:= by
  suffices h : ∀ m, Nat.fib m * Nat.fib m + Nat.fib (m+1) * Nat.fib (m+1) = Nat.fib (2*m+1) ∧
                    Nat.fib m * Nat.fib (m+1) + Nat.fib (m+1) * Nat.fib (m+2) = Nat.fib (2*m+2) from
    (h n).1
  intro m
  induction m with
  | zero => simp [Nat.fib]
  | succ k ih =>
    obtain ⟨ihk1, ihk2⟩ := ih
    have fib_k2 : Nat.fib (k+2) = Nat.fib k + Nat.fib (k+1) := Nat.fib_add_two
    have fib_k3 : Nat.fib (k+3) = Nat.fib (k+1) + Nat.fib (k+2) := Nat.fib_add_two
    have fib_2k3 : Nat.fib (2*k+3) = Nat.fib (2*k+1) + Nat.fib (2*k+2) := by
      have h : 2*k+3 = (2*k+1) + 2 := by ring
      rw [h]; exact Nat.fib_add_two
    have fib_2k4 : Nat.fib (2*k+4) = Nat.fib (2*k+2) + Nat.fib (2*k+3) := by
      have h : 2*k+4 = (2*k+2) + 2 := by ring
      rw [h]; exact Nat.fib_add_two
    constructor
    · show Nat.fib (k+1) * Nat.fib (k+1) + Nat.fib (k+2) * Nat.fib (k+2) = Nat.fib (2*(k+1)+1)
      rw [show 2*(k+1)+1 = 2*k+3 by ring]
      nlinarith [fib_k2, fib_2k3, ihk1, ihk2]
    · show Nat.fib (k+1) * Nat.fib (k+2) + Nat.fib (k+2) * Nat.fib (k+3) = Nat.fib (2*(k+1)+2)
      rw [show 2*(k+1)+2 = 2*k+4 by ring]
      nlinarith [fib_k2, fib_k3, fib_2k3, fib_2k4, ihk1, ihk2]
